name: SoundScout
description: An app that helps users discover and explore local music events, concerts, and festivals. It provides event listings, artist profiles, and social features to connect with other music lovers.
features: Event listings with filters by genre, location, and date
Artist profiles with music samples and upcoming shows
Social features to connect with other concert-goers
Personalized event recommendations based on user preferences
target_audience: Music enthusiasts, concert-goers, and fans of local artists
